---
title: "Salt Marsh Species"
page-layout: full
listing:
  type: custom
  template: _ejs/item.ejs.md
  categories: false
  contents: species/
  sort: "species"
  fields:
    - species
    - accepted_code
    - alternate_codes
    - diminutive
    - alternate_diminutives
    - description
    - image
    - categories
    - habitat
  include:
    habitat: ["marsh"]
css: species-listing.css
---
